memo.title: # Visual Feedback (Browser Agent Guide)
memo.intro: > Show the **shot.png** in this folder to the AI as an image (let it directly see the picture, not text coordinates).
memo.claudeCode: > - Claude Code: paste / drag the `shot.png` path into the chat / Ctrl+V
memo.antigravity: > - Antigravity (IDE): drag / paste the image into the editor
memo.legacyNote: > Text fallback for when the image can't be viewed.
opt.head.desc: Manage the AI connection, save range, and per-page memory rules.
opt.ai.keyHint: The API key is stored only in chrome.storage.local; it is sent externally only when requesting the selected AI API.
opt.memory.hint: When injectHtml / injectCss / injectScript and similar succeed in the sidebar chat, they are auto-saved as a revisit rule for the range selected here. Individual rules can be changed later in the list below.
opt.daemon.intro: Send “drawing to AI as an image” directly to a running daemon over WebSocket instead of saving via downloads (when enabled). Start the daemon (cd daemon && npm start) and paste the token shown at startup below. When disabled or unreachable, it falls back to chrome.downloads as before.
opt.daemon.enable: Send to the daemon (enable WebSocket push)
opt.daemon.autoSync: Auto-sync the AI tray (no send button needed)
opt.daemon.tokenPlaceholder: token shown when the daemon starts
opt.daemon.hint: The token authenticates the local WebSocket (prevents localhost connections from malicious web pages / mitigates CVE-2025-52882). It is stored only in chrome.storage.local.
opt.daemon.autoSyncHint: Auto-sync sends only when the daemon is reachable; it does not auto-download on failure.
opt.daemon.timeout: Timed out (daemon not running or wrong URL)
opt.daemon.testFailed: Connection failed (not running / wrong URL / token mismatch)
opt.rules.hint: Saving a note or making changes to a page via chat automatically adds a rule for that URL. Use manual add when you want to apply to a broader range, such as a whole domain.
opt.rules.empty: No remembered URLs yet. They are added automatically when you add a note or make changes via chat.
opt.recipe.hint: A JSON array of verb actions applied every time the selected URL/rule page loads. Display changes added via chat are also saved here.
opt.recipe.errShape: Each item must be in {verb, args} form.
opt.recipe.errVerb: Only these verbs are allowed in recipes: {verbs} (got: {verb})
